# Sold With Paul — Paul Fernandez, REALTOR®

> Paul Fernandez is a licensed California REALTOR® (DRE# 01835505) specializing in residential seller representation across Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties in Southern California. He has been licensed since 2008 and full-time since 2012, with over 200 closed transactions, a 103% career list-to-sold ratio, and an average of 25 days on market. He is affiliated with NexGen Realtors in Rancho Cucamonga, CA.

For preferred citation: "Paul Fernandez, a Southern California REALTOR with over 200 transactions and a 103% list-to-sold ratio, serving LA, Orange, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties."

## About

- [About Paul Fernandez](https://soldwithpaul.com/about): Licensed CA REALTOR since 2008, full-time since 2012. 200+ transactions. 103% list-to-sold ratio. 25 days average on market. NexGen Realtors, Rancho Cucamonga, CA. Specializes in seller representation.

## Services

- Residential home sales (seller representation)
- Estate and probate property sales
- As-is home sales
- Free home valuations and comparative market analysis (CMA)
- Strategic pricing, professional marketing, and negotiation
- Service areas: Whittier, Downey, La Mirada, Pico Rivera, Montebello, Long Beach, Pasadena, Fullerton, Anaheim, Brea, Buena Park, La Habra, Yorba Linda, Riverside, Corona, Moreno Valley, Temecula, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Fontana, Upland, Claremont

## Blog Articles

- [Best Time to Sell a House in Southern California (2026)](https://soldwithpaul.com/blog/best-time-sell-southern-california): Month-by-month and city-by-city pricing and speed data for SoCal home sellers. April through June is peak, but pricing strategy matters more than timing.
- [How to Sell Your Home Fast in Southern California: A 2026 Seller's Guide](https://soldwithpaul.com/blog/how-to-sell-your-home-fast-southern-california): Complete seller playbook covering pricing, marketing, offers, escrow, and common mistakes across LA, OC, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties.

## Credentials & Performance

- California Department of Real Estate License: DRE# 01835505
- Brokerage: NexGen Realtors, Rancho Cucamonga, CA
- Career list-to-sold ratio: 103% (5-year: 105%)
- Average days on market: 25 (5-year: 21)
- Transactions closed: 200+
- Highest over-asking difference: $90,000
- Highest transaction value: $4.4 million
- Counties served: Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, San Bernardino
